title: conyza monorchis
intro: Conyza monorchis, also known as white fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Conyza monorchis can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
